meta.title: Eval Trend & Drift Monitor
meta.desc: V2: Historical eval pass-rate trends over time. Visualizes drift across eval runs with selectable chart/table view. Uses the ref+form selector pattern for adaptive display.

sqlite.query: SELECT run_date, category, SUM(CASE WHEN result='PASS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as passed, SUM(CASE WHEN result='FAIL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as failed, SUM(CASE WHEN result='PENDING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pending, COUNT(*) as total, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN result='PASS' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) * 100, 1) as pass_rate FROM eval_results GROUP BY run_date, category ORDER BY run_date, category

SELECT run_date, agent_name as agent, SUM(CASE WHEN result='PASS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as passed, SUM(CASE WHEN result='FAIL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as failed, COUNT(*) as total, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN result='PASS' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) * 100, 1) as pass_rate FROM eval_results GROUP BY run_date, agent_name ORDER BY run_date, agent_name

compute.expr: 'Overall pass rate: **' & computed_values.latest_pass_rate & '** across **' & $string($count($distinct(fetched_sources.trend_data.run_date))) & '** evaluation runs'
